Package model.ofx

Class OfxV2Writer

    private static void
    writeBankingSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> txns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo acctInfo, BigDecimal ledgerBalance, String asOfDate)
    Writes the BANKMSGSRSV1 section including bank transactions and ledger balance.
    private static void
    writeCreditCardSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> txns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ledgerBalance, String asOfDate)
    Writes the CREDITCARDMSGSRSV1 section including credit card transactions.
    private static void
    writeInvestmentSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData inv)
    Writes the INVSTMTMSGSRSV1 section containing investment account info and cash balance.
    static void
    writeOfxFile(String filePath, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> bankTxns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo bankInfo, BigDecimal bankLedgerBalance, String bankLedgerAsOf, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> creditCardTxns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ccLedgerBalance, String ccLedgerAsOf, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData investment)
    Writes a complete OFX 2.0 file with banking, credit card, and investment sections.
    private static void
    writeSignonSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon)
    Writes the SIGNONMSGSRSV1 section for authentication and server info.

  • Field Details

    • OFX_DATE_TIME

      private static final DateTimeFormatter OFX_DATE_TIME

  • Constructor Details

      public OfxV2Writer()

  • Method Details

    • writeOfxFile

      public static void writeOfxFile(String filePath, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> bankTxns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo bankInfo, BigDecimal bankLedgerBalance, String bankLedgerAsOf, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> creditCardTxns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ccLedgerBalance, String ccLedgerAsOf, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData investment) throws Exception
      Writes a complete OFX 2.0 file with banking, credit card, and investment sections.
      Parameters:
      filePath - Output file path for the OFX file.
      signon - Signon metadata including FI info and timestamp.
      bankTxns - List of bank account transactions.
      bankInfo - Bank account details.
      bankLedgerBalance - Ledger balance for bank account.
      bankLedgerAsOf - As-of timestamp for bank ledger balance.
      creditCardTxns - List of credit card transactions.
      ccInfo - Credit card account details.
      ccLedgerBalance - Ledger balance for credit card account.
      ccLedgerAsOf - As-of timestamp for credit card balance.
      investment - Investment account data.
      Throws:
      Exception - If any IO or XML error occurs.

    • writeSignonSection

      private static void writeSignonSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon) throws Exception
      Writes the SIGNONMSGSRSV1 section for authentication and server info.
      Parameters:
      writer - XML stream writer.
      signon - Signon details including org, FID, language, and server time.
      Throws:
      Exception - If XML writing fails.

    • writeBankingSection

      private static void writeBankingSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> txns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo acctInfo, BigDecimal ledgerBalance, String asOfDate) throws Exception
      Writes the BANKMSGSRSV1 section including bank transactions and ledger balance.
      Parameters:
      writer - XML stream writer.
      txns - List of bank transactions.
      acctInfo - Bank account information.
      ledgerBalance - Ledger balance for bank account.
      asOfDate - Date of ledger balance.
      Throws:
      Exception - If XML writing fails.

    • writeCreditCardSection

      private static void writeCreditCardSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> txns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ledgerBalance, String asOfDate) throws Exception
      Writes the CREDITCARDMSGSRSV1 section including credit card transactions.
      Parameters:
      writer - XML stream writer.
      txns - List of credit card transactions.
      ccInfo - Credit card account information.
      ledgerBalance - Ledger balance of credit card.
      asOfDate - Date of ledger balance.
      Throws:
      Exception - If XML writing fails.

    • writeInvestmentSection

      private static void writeInvestmentSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData inv) throws Exception
      Writes the INVSTMTMSGSRSV1 section containing investment account info and cash balance.
      Parameters:
      writer - XML stream writer.
      inv - Investment account metadata and available cash.
      Throws:
      Exception - If XML writing fails.
